name: @ont/claim
description: ONT B5 surface — the claim site. Assembles the unsigned claim/anchor tx (@ont/adapter-publisher), hands signing off across a wallet boundary (never signs here), and reads/renders chain-derived state (@ont/adapter-resolver + @ont/adapter-indexer). Convenience, NOT ownership authority; consumes L1-L4 APIs and reimplements no rules.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/claim-path && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-indexer && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-publisher && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-resolver && vitest run
